prompt.scholar: What was the first message sent over the internet (ARPANET) in 1969?
prompt.explorer: What was the first internet message?

options.scholar: LO (the system crashed before completing LOGIN)
options.explorer: LO (the system crashed before completing LOGIN)

explanation.scholar: The first ARPANET message was supposed to be 'LOGIN' but the system crashed after transmitting just 'LO.'
explanation.explorer: The first internet message was supposed to say LOGIN but the computer crashed after just two letters: LO!
